description_long: This serving tray set features a rectangular, light wood tray with a subtle grain pattern and a low, flat rim. Resting on the tray are four small, round cups with a marbled blue-green exterior and a white interior, arranged in a loose cluster. A white ceramic teapot with a simple, rounded form and a short spout sits beside the cups, its handle and lid both smoothly integrated into the design. The tray's surface is smooth and unadorned, providing a clean backdrop for the more visually textured cups. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and modern, with a harmonious blend of natural wood and ceramic materials. No visible branding or decorative motifs are present, emphasizing functionality and understated elegance.
description: A minimalist light wood tray holds a white ceramic teapot and four marbled blue-green cups, creating a clean and modern serving set.
description_view_0: The tray is seen from above at an angle, showing the teapot on the right and four marbled cups arranged to the left and center.
description_view_1: Viewed from the teapot's handle side, the teapot is centered in the foreground with the four cups visible behind it.
description_view_2: The tray is viewed from the opposite side, with the teapot on the left and the four cups grouped on the right.
description_view_3: From the rear, the teapot is at the back of the tray, with the four cups in the foreground, clearly showing their marbled pattern.
attribute_handles: One integrated ceramic handle on the teapot, rounded and attached to the side; no handles on the tray or cups.
attribute_rim_design: The tray has a low, flat rim approximately 1 cm high and 0.5 cm thick, with straight edges and no decorative features; the cups and teapot have smooth, rounded rims.
attribute_decorative_patterns: The cups feature a marbled blue-green pattern covering their exterior; the tray and teapot are plain with no decorative motifs.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surfaces are predominantly matte with minimal reflectivity; the ceramic teapot and cups have a slight sheen, while the wood tray is fully matte. No strong reflections or glare are visible.
